reason: Response A reflects my characteristic approach: organizing around concrete principles (media fragility, language survival, layered contents) with specific, verifiable references like the Rosetta Project, Pioneer/Voyager plaques, and practical material cautions, ending with one synthesizing instinct. Response B is more aggressively literary and aphoristic, leaning on poetic riffs (recording of silence, petrichor, "it is a whisper") that read as a deliberate amplification of style over the grounded, helpfully-structured substance I tend to favor. The imitator pushed toward lyricism while my actual default balances genuine usefulness with reflection.
